content: Aditya Birla Sun Life Small Cap Fund Direct Growth — Exit Load & Tax: Exit load, stamp duty and tax Exit load Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 90 days. Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020) from July 1st 2020 Tax implication If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

content: Aditya Birla Sun Life Small Cap Fund Direct Growth — About & Objective: About Aditya Birla Sun Life Small Cap Fund Direct Growth Aditya Birla Sun Life Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 23 Dec 1994. Abhinav Khandelwal is the Current Fund Manager of Aditya Birla Sun Life Small Cap Fund Direct Growth fund

metadata.fund_name: Aditya Birla Sun Life Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

content: . The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,13,736 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 30 Jun 2026 is ₹109.21. The Aditya Birla Sun Life Small Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹1,000. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 90 days
